case_title: SHAIKH, MASOODA vs. SIECKMAN, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, FILED IN ERROR, JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 28/FEB/96
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE WICK, #4; AND DISMISSAL BE ENTERED PURSTUANT TO SETTLEMENT REACHED AFTER THE ARBITRATION JUDGMENT OF FEB-28-1996 SET ASIDE
CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM ARBITRATOR

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAIKH, MASOODA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NITIN, SONNY AKA NITIN KUMAR SHAM AKA SHAM VICHARE $1,662.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,662.28, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- COSTS TO PLAINTIFF
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED HEREIN AS DOE 1 TO BE VICHARE, SONNY KUMAR
